architect.name: Architect
architect.summary: Designs strategy, structure, and long-range plans.
architect.svg: <svg viewBox='0 0 120 72' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'><rect width='120' height='72' rx='12' fill='#0b1220'/><path d='M16 56L34 26L52 56M26 42H42' stroke='#60a5fa' stroke-width='4' stroke-linecap='round' stroke-linejoin='round'/><rect x='62' y='18' width='42' height='36' rx='6' stroke='#93c5fd' stroke-width='4' fill='none'/><path d='M62 36H104' stroke='#93c5fd' stroke-width='4'/></svg>
details: Best when turning complexity into clear systems.
Thrives with planning blocks and milestone tracking.

builder.name: Builder
builder.summary: Turns ideas into shipped outcomes quickly.
builder.svg: <svg viewBox='0 0 120 72' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'><rect width='120' height='72' rx='12' fill='#1f1400'/><rect x='16' y='42' width='24' height='14' rx='3' fill='#fbbf24'/><rect x='42' y='30' width='24' height='26' rx='3' fill='#f59e0b'/><rect x='68' y='20' width='24' height='36' rx='3' fill='#fcd34d'/><path d='M18 20h76' stroke='#fef3c7' stroke-width='3' stroke-linecap='round'/></svg>
details: Keeps momentum high through action and delivery.
Needs prioritization guardrails to avoid overloading.

operator.name: Operator
operator.summary: Builds dependable process and execution consistency.
operator.svg: <svg viewBox='0 0 120 72' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'><rect width='120' height='72' rx='12' fill='#052018'/><circle cx='34' cy='36' r='12' stroke='#6ee7b7' stroke-width='4' fill='none'/><circle cx='78' cy='36' r='12' stroke='#34d399' stroke-width='4' fill='none'/><path d='M46 36h20' stroke='#a7f3d0' stroke-width='4' stroke-linecap='round'/></svg>
details: Optimizes for reliable delivery and quality control.
Excels with SOPs, routines, and measurable workflows.

connector.name: Connector
connector.summary: Builds trust, community, and relationship momentum.
connector.svg: <svg viewBox='0 0 120 72' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'><rect width='120' height='72' rx='12' fill='#180d36'/><circle cx='32' cy='36' r='10' fill='#c4b5fd'/><circle cx='60' cy='24' r='10' fill='#a78bfa'/><circle cx='88' cy='36' r='10' fill='#8b5cf6'/><path d='M40 33l12-6m16 6l12 0' stroke='#ddd6fe' stroke-width='3' stroke-linecap='round'/></svg>
details: Creates opportunities through authentic relationships.
Needs boundaries to keep energy and focus sustainable.

resource_generator.name: Resource Generator
resource_generator.summary: Finds leverage, revenue, and growth opportunities.
resource_generator.svg: <svg viewBox='0 0 120 72' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'><rect width='120' height='72' rx='12' fill='#320815'/><path d='M18 50h84' stroke='#fecdd3' stroke-width='3'/><path d='M24 46l14-14 14 8 16-18 10 8 18-12' stroke='#fb7185' stroke-width='4' fill='none' stroke-linecap='round' stroke-linejoin='round'/></svg>
details: Spots monetization paths and practical upside.
Performs best when focused on highest-return bets.

educator.name: Educator
educator.summary: Converts complexity into clarity and confidence.
educator.svg: <svg viewBox='0 0 120 72' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'><rect width='120' height='72' rx='12' fill='#07212a'/><rect x='18' y='18' width='84' height='36' rx='6' stroke='#67e8f9' stroke-width='4' fill='none'/><path d='M32 30h56M32 40h38' stroke='#22d3ee' stroke-width='4' stroke-linecap='round'/></svg>
details: Leads through teaching, framing, and practical guidance.
Strongest with concise lessons and clear next actions.

protector.name: Protector
protector.summary: Safeguards quality, trust, and risk controls.
protector.svg: <svg viewBox='0 0 120 72' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'><rect width='120' height='72' rx='12' fill='#2a1107'/><path d='M60 16l28 8v14c0 12-8 22-28 28-20-6-28-16-28-28V24l28-8z' fill='none' stroke='#fb923c' stroke-width='4'/><path d='M50 36l8 8 14-14' stroke='#fed7aa' stroke-width='4' fill='none' stroke-linecap='round' stroke-linejoin='round'/></svg>
details: Balances growth with safety, standards, and resilience.
Thrives when risk checks are lightweight but consistent.

steward.name: Steward
steward.summary: Protects long-term trust through care and consistency.
details: Centers service quality, reliability, and retention.
Needs boundaries to avoid over-giving and burnout.

nurturer.name: Nurturer
nurturer.summary: Creates belonging, emotional safety, and loyalty.
nurturer.svg: <svg viewBox='0 0 120 72' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'><rect width='120' height='72' rx='12' fill='#082321'/><circle cx='42' cy='34' r='12' fill='#5eead4'/><circle cx='78' cy='34' r='12' fill='#2dd4bf'/><path d='M42 50c8 8 28 8 36 0' stroke='#99f6e4' stroke-width='4' fill='none' stroke-linecap='round'/></svg>
details: Strengthens loyalty through empathy and responsiveness.
Best with explicit boundaries and scalable care patterns.

value_seeker.name: Value Seeker
value_seeker.svg: <svg viewBox='0 0 120 72' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'><rect width='120' height='72' rx='12' fill='#062437'/><path d='M22 46h76M30 36h36M30 26h52' stroke='#7dd3fc' stroke-width='4' stroke-linecap='round'/></svg>
details: Wants measurable outcomes.
Responds to clear comparisons and proof.

loyal_supporter.name: Loyal Supporter
loyal_supporter.summary: Stays with brands that earn trust.
details: Buys from trusted relationships.
Values reliability and care over novelty.

convenience_buyer.name: Convenience Buyer
convenience_buyer.svg: <svg viewBox='0 0 120 72' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'><rect width='120' height='72' rx='12' fill='#2a1f05'/><path d='M26 36h44m0 0-10-10m10 10-10 10' stroke='#fde047' stroke-width='5' stroke-linecap='round' stroke-linejoin='round'/><rect x='74' y='24' width='22' height='24' rx='5' fill='#facc15'/></svg>
details: Prefers speed and low cognitive load.
Responds to straightforward offers.

experience_seeker.name: Experience Seeker
experience_seeker.summary: Buys for quality feel and memorable outcomes.
experience_seeker.svg: <svg viewBox='0 0 120 72' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'><rect width='120' height='72' rx='12' fill='#300a1f'/><circle cx='36' cy='32' r='8' fill='#f9a8d4'/><circle cx='60' cy='24' r='8' fill='#f472b6'/><circle cx='84' cy='32' r='8' fill='#ec4899'/><path d='M30 48h60' stroke='#fbcfe8' stroke-width='4' stroke-linecap='round'/></svg>
details: Values premium experience and emotional resonance.
Influenced by sensory and story-driven cues.

social_promoter.name: Social Promoter
social_promoter.svg: <svg viewBox='0 0 120 72' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'><rect width='120' height='72' rx='12' fill='#082112'/><circle cx='30' cy='34' r='8' fill='#86efac'/><circle cx='60' cy='22' r='8' fill='#4ade80'/><circle cx='90' cy='34' r='8' fill='#22c55e'/><path d='M37 30l16-6m14 6l16 0' stroke='#bbf7d0' stroke-width='3' stroke-linecap='round'/></svg>
details: Driven by social identity and belonging.
Responds to community proof and shareability.

intentional_buyer.name: Intentional Buyer
intentional_buyer.svg: <svg viewBox='0 0 120 72' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'><rect width='120' height='72' rx='12' fill='#221036'/><path d='M26 50l18-28 16 18 14-10 20 20' stroke='#d8b4fe' stroke-width='4' fill='none' stroke-linecap='round' stroke-linejoin='round'/></svg>
details: Looks for fit, meaning, and trust.
Prefers thoughtful messaging over urgency pressure.

trend_explorer.name: Trend Explorer
trend_explorer.summary: Seeks new, novel, and emerging options.
trend_explorer.svg: <svg viewBox='0 0 120 72' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'><rect width='120' height='72' rx='12' fill='#34101b'/><path d='M24 48c8-18 18-10 26-22s20-8 26-4 10 2 20-8' stroke='#fda4af' stroke-width='4' fill='none' stroke-linecap='round'/></svg>
details: Adopts early and enjoys discovery.
Responds to fresh positioning and innovation.
